title: Aeon
description: Aeon is an exciting Minecraft tech mod that introduces a futuristic technology progression system and so much more!
body:
# Aeon Mod

> NOTE: This Mod Is Currently In Its Concept Stage So Its Unstable And Missing A Lot Of Planned Features, Items And Blocks That Means Things Might Change Or Break At Any Time Without Any Warning Please Do Not Play This Mod If You Wish Your World Won't Be Corrupted!

#### Current Development Stage: 1/4 (Concept)

**Aeon** is an exciting Minecraft tech mod that introduces a futuristic technology progression system. Explore new ores, craft advanced machines, and automate your world with seamless wireless power. From basic automation to high-tech gadgets, **Aeon** transforms your Minecraft experience with cutting-edge features and innovation.

## Features

- **Technological Progression:** Evolve through distinct ages, starting with basic Aeon Ore and advancing to high-tech machinery and gear.
- **Wireless Power System:** Charge your tools, gadgets, and machines wirelessly with Energy Emitters and Wireless Receivers.
- **Automation:** Automate farming, mining, and more with powerful machines like the Omni-Quarry and automated mob farms.
- **Advanced Gadgets:** Use the Interplanar Communicator for cross-server communication, the Night Vision Gadget for exploring dark places, and much more.
- **Futuristic Gear:** Equip yourself with high-tech tools and armor, including the Aeonic Gauntlet and Exosuit, for enhanced gameplay.

## Installation

### Modrinth App (Recommended)
1. **Make** an new instance or use an existing one.
2. **Add** the latest version **Aeon** from the mod list.
3. **Launch** Minecraft with the play button.

### Fabric Loader:
1. **Download** the latest version of **Aeon** from the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/aeon-mod/versions) page.
2. **Place** the downloaded .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder.
3. **Launch** Minecraft with the Fabric loader.

## Getting Started

1. **Mine Aeon Ore:** Begin by mining Aeon Ore and smelting it to get your first Aeon Ingots.
2. **Craft the Guidebook:** Use your first Aeon Ingot to craft the Guidebook, which will walk you through the mod's features and progression.
3. **Progress Through Ages:** Follow the Guidebook to unlock new technology, gadgets, and machinery.
4. **Utilize Wireless Power:** Set up Energy Emitters and Wireless Receivers to power your devices without the need for cables.
